scripts.dev: concurrently -n ephem,client -c magenta,green "npm run dev:ephemeris" "npm run dev:client"
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd client && npm install && cd ../functions && npm install && cd ../bibliotheca_astrologica_horaria/functions && npm install && cd ../../ephemeris-service && py -3.13 -m venv .venv && node ../scripts/install-python-deps.js
